channel.title: Golang on Hugo Book
channel.description: Recent content in Golang on Hugo Book

item.description: Memory Leaking Scenarios # # import "github.com/DeanThompson/ginpprof" ginpprof.Wrapper(router) Case Sets # Case1: https://github.com/golang/go/issues/25484 yes, the way used by strings.Builder, is a more efficient way. func ByteSlice2String(bs []byte) string { return *(*string)(unsafe.Pointer(&bs)) } For reference, this is the source referred to https://www.openmymind.net/Go-Slices-And-The-Case-Of-The-Missing-Memory/
Golang Command Line tools # Linux pipes in Golang 使用Go语言在MacOS创建一个自定义的命令行工具 你应该定期更新 Homebrew
